title: JJBA Cosplay
description: This mod adds many different costumes from Jojo's Bizarre Adventure by Hirohiko Araki. This mod adds the costumes as tiered armor sets
body:
# JJBA Cosplay 
Is a mod developed by members of the Jcraft Team! This mod takes all of the different costume elements from jcraft and makes it a separate mod! This mod works without having Jcraft installed! JJBA Cosplay is currently on 1.20.1 for both Forge and Fabric with plans to port to later versions! JJBA Cosplay has a tiered armor system which can be upgraded in the anvil. So a cosplay item can have the protection of Diamond or Netherite Armor!

## Developed By:
Ayutac 

## Models + Textures By: 
Rec0rd, Mr. Garlic, Bagwet

## Cosplay List
